title: Simple StepUp
description: This mod adds random features meant for the Helium SMP, like 1 block step height, a redstone "speaker" and glazed sweet berries.
body:
This mod is a Work In Progress

Made with MCreator

Adds:
- Chat Reporter (aka Redstone Speaker)
- Honey Glazed Sweet Berries
- a few paintings
- shader effects given by potion effects
- Swap enchantment (swaps the position of the attacker and the entity it hits)
